hero.headline:
Edit faster.
Ship better content.
hero.body: Vibed cuts your edit time in half. Just describe what you want — remove silences, add captions, zoom to speaker — and watch it happen.
hero.caption: No credit card required · Works with any video

problem.headline: Editing is the bottleneck
problem.kicker: Most creators spend 4+ hours editing a single video.
problem.kickerBoldFg: That's time you could spend creating.

pains.headline: Silence removal eats your time
pains.body: Hunting dead air clip by clip — 45 minutes of your life, every single video.

pains.headline: Captions that need constant fixing
pains.body: Auto-captions are wrong 30% of the time. Correcting them manually costs another hour.

pains.headline: Reformatting for every platform
pains.body: The same crop, the same reframe — done separately for TikTok, Shorts, and LinkedIn.

moments.title: Conversational editing
moments.copy: Tell the AI what to do, and watch the timeline update in seconds.

moments.title: Your transcript is your timeline
moments.copy: Click any sentence in the transcript — the playhead jumps right there.

moments.title: Type what you want to cut
moments.copy: "Cut from 'so anyway' to 'let's move on'" — the cut appears instantly.

moments.title: Speaker-scoped commands
moments.copy: "Remove all of Marc's hesitations" — Vibed highlights and cuts them automatically.

beforeAfter.headline:
The numbers
speak for themselves.
beforeAfter.subtitle: Average time for a 10-minute talking-head video

personas.headline:
Whatever you make,
Vibed makes it faster.

list.description: Long-form creators who edit hours of footage down to polished videos.
list.before: Spending 4+ hours per video on silences, captions, and manual cuts.
list.after: Same edit done in under 30 minutes with AI-assisted commands.

list.description: Audio-first creators who need clean recordings and readable transcripts.
list.before: Manually scrubbing every episode for dead air and filler words.
list.after: Silence removed, transcript synced, and captions ready — automatically.

list.description: Educators building structured video content with consistent pacing.
list.before: Struggling to keep pacing tight across long, multi-section recordings.
list.after: Clean chapters, perfect pacing, and chapter markers added in one command.

exports.headline: Every format. Every platform.
exports.body1: Export directly to TikTok, YouTube, Instagram Reels, and LinkedIn — optimized for each platform's requirements.
exports.body2: Or download as MP4, and export XML for Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve.

pricing.headline: Start free. Scale when you're ready.
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees. Cancel anytime.

quotes.text: Vibed cut my editing time from 4 hours to 20 minutes. I can finally post consistently.
quotes.author: Alex R.

quotes.text: The silence removal alone saves me an hour per episode. Then I add captions in one click.
quotes.author: Maria T.

roi.body: At 4 videos per month, that's 12 hours back in your life.

footer.tagline: AI video editing for creators who ship.
